We support XBOX, PC, and PS4 accounts.

Want to become a player?

Player accounts allow you to create custom game sessions
and earn money from playing with your fans.

Ninja

pc

192 Ratings

Ninja is an American YouTuber, Mixer Streamer, a professional eSports Gamer, and former Twitch Streamer who is mostly known for playing and streaming Fortnite: Battle Royale.

Download the app to team up
with your favorite players.
